description_long: This chair features a minimalist design with a light wood seat and backrest, both displaying a subtle, natural wood grain pattern. The backrest is arched and split vertically, providing a simple yet elegant support structure. The seat is flat and rectangular, offering a stable sitting surface. Four slender, black metal legs support the chair, giving it a modern and lightweight appearance. The combination of wood and metal materials makes it suitable for contemporary urban environments. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a functional aesthetic.
description: A modern chair with a light wood seat and arched backrest, supported by four slender black metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the arched wooden backrest with a central vertical split and the flat wooden seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thin profile of the wooden backrest and seat, as well as the angled black metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical split in the backrest and the alignment of the four legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the slimness of the seat and backrest.
